Élan Agency is the parent company behind a growing portfolio of premium brands. Real estate. Fragrance. Coffee. Talent. Watches. One standard runs through all of them.

Our Structure Our Brands
Scroll
How We're Structured

One parent.
Many businesses.

Élan Agency is not a multi-service agency. It's a holding company. Beneath it sit independently operated businesses — each built for a specific market, each run to the same premium standard. The depth lives in the brands. Élan is what ties them together.

The Élan Standard

Every brand we build
is built to last.

We don't launch businesses to fill a portfolio. We build them because there's a genuine opportunity to do something better than what already exists. Premium execution. Discerning clients. One reputation across everything we touch.

Real Estate
Premium property.
Exceptional outcomes.
01
Discerning Clients

Every business under Élan is built for people who care about quality — who notice the difference between good and exceptional, and choose accordingly.

02
Premium Execution

From product formulation to customer experience, every detail is considered. We don't launch anything we wouldn't be proud to put our name on.

03
Purpose Built

Each vertical exists because there's a real opportunity to do something better than what's already in the market — not to fill a grid on a website.

04
One Reputation

Every brand carries the Élan name. That means every interaction reflects the same values, the same care, and the same commitment to excellence.

Fragrance

Scents of Élan.
Luxury, hand-poured.

Eleven signature candles across three curated collections. Each one inspired by the world's most iconic fragrances, hand-poured in Brisbane, and finished to a standard that rivals anything on the international market.

Explore the Collection →
Coffee
Great coffee.
Real impact.

Cozzee Coffee

Specialty coffee
with a cause.

100% ethically sourced Arabica beans, roasted fresh to order. Every purchase sends 100% of profits to the cause of your choice. Seven causes. Unlimited impact.

Discover Cozzee →

Leadership
Founder & CEO
Samuel
Ferguson
Élan Agency · Brisbane, Australia

18 years of senior leadership across sales, general management, and business development. Founded Élan Agency as the holding structure for a growing portfolio of premium brands spanning real estate, fragrance, coffee, talent, and beyond.

Brisbane-based. Global standard.

Investment & Partnership

We're building
more than brands.

Élan Agency is actively expanding its portfolio. If you're an investor, a brand founder, or a business looking for a home inside a premium holding structure — we'd like to talk.

I.
Investors

Access to a diversified premium portfolio across multiple consumer verticals with a single point of contact.

II.
Brand Founders

Built something worth acquiring? Élan provides structure, capital, and the operational backbone to scale.

III.
Strategic Partners

Distribution, licensing, or co-venture opportunities across our active and upcoming brand portfolio.
